Barney will never have a chance with her, but Lisa keeps that to herself. This way, she never has to pay spillage fines.

Let’s get that oil! Are you ready to go?
You struck oil! But where should you take it? To Kyle or Onno of course!
Hiya! I’ve been in the oil biz for ages and it made me filthy rich. I like to smoke cigars and chew on them, and I light them with 100 dollar bills.
Become the Town's next Mayor!
Buenos dias! I have sailed the world as a ship captain for years, and I can’t even swim. I don’t want to worry about drowning any more, unless it’s in money!
When they’re finished building my bank. You can visit me soon for all your monetary needs.
Gotcha like a fish out of water, now!
No one will stand in my way.
This is gonna hurt you more than its gonna hurt me!

You all look good enough to eat!

These phone booths of unknown origin are everywhere. It seems like they can turn back time.
Computer AI watching the destruction of the galaxy and being unable to stop it.
Distributed across the galaxy by the Seeder ships, these devices allow instantaneous travel.
Seeder robots are indestructible killing machines produced by the billions and sent to eradicate all intelligent lifeforms in the galaxy.
An alien heavy lifting machine capable of traversing any terrain and manipulating gravity of other objects.
Animal species native to the seeder home planet. Easily scared.
A mercenary ship outfitted with a short-range jumpdrive, allowing the ship to 'shift' out of harm's way.
The Ardath fleet is a group of human raiders who allied with the alien forces in order to survive.
As soon as the alien attack hit, the fringe colonies were abandoned by the human defenders. These cities were then quickly raided and destroyed by the aliens.
The territorial Shev'lak clan have adapted to the extreme cold and have used the hostile environment as a means of protection against intruders.
A fanatical race following the will of their misterious god known as the 'Seer of Stars'.

"Much of what we call evil can often be converted into a bracing and tonic good by a simple change of the sufferer's inner attitude from one of fear to one of fight”
― William James

descriptions.name: The Sigil of Fight
descriptions.type: Face It - A game to fight inner demons Trading Card

tags.localized_tag_name: Face It - A game to fight inner demons

descriptions.value:
"Constructive anger," the demon said, her voice dripping sarcasm.

"Also known as passion," I said quietly. "Passion has overthrown tyrants and freed prisoners and slaves. Passion has brought justice where there was savagery. Passion has created freedom where there was nothing but fear. Passion has helped souls rise from the ashes of their horrible lives and build something better, stronger, more beautiful.”
― Jim Butcher, White Night

descriptions.type: Face It - A game to fight inner demons Trading Card
